element.label: Is this Office a Tasking Authority?
element.name: includeintaskingauthority

element.hint: Use this to set a sort order other than the OU abbreviation. Any OUs with the same Sort Order will sub sort by abbreviation.
element.label: Sort Order
element.name: level_order

element.label: Total Active Tasks
element.name: numberofactivetasksinou

element.label: Total Active Sub OUs
element.name: numberofchildous

element.label: Total Members
element.name: numberofmembersinou

element.hint: Select this field to create an External Organizational Unit. If unselected, the Organizational Unit will be created as an internal organization.
element.label: OU Type
element.name: u_external_flag

element.label: Task Administrators
element.name: u_global_authorities

element.label: Total Contacts
element.name: u_numberofcontactsinou

element.hint: Set the OU Schedule override field to override the default system schedule for this OU.
element.label: OU Schedule Override
element.name: u_schedule_override
